julesThoughtProcess: Neon pink (#FF0055) screams high-energy 1990s cyberpunk to me. It pairs beautifully with harsh shadows and brings a frantic, synthetic energy to the subject.
storyPanel: A renegade decker caught in the neon pulse of Sector 4. They said the data run was suicide, but the payoff from the Yashida corp was too preem to pass up.
